subject: Piccolo Jr. (Dragon Ball Super) — green-skinned Namekian fighter with large turban-like head wrap and purple gi, in a dynamic forward-moving action pose
description: A green-skinned humanoid figure with a large pale turban-style head wrap and pointed ears charges forward in a purple gi. White and purple energy surges around him. The composition is a mid-shot angled slightly upward, emphasizing forward speed. The figure's expression is intense and focused.
foreground: green-skinned Namekian in purple gi with white turban, charging forward with energy aura
